ogTitle: Dardanup vs Dardanup West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dardanup and Dardanup West.
heading: Dardanup vs Dardanup West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dardanup, Western Australia and Dardanup West, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dardanup West has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Dardanup (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dardanup or Dardanup West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dardanup has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Dardanup West scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dardanup scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Dardanup West scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dardanup or Dardanup West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dardanup West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
